notes: v2.9.0 (2026-07-11T03:07:10Z) + v1.107.1 (2026-07-11T03:07:09Z) back-to-back ~25h after v2.8.0. GHSA-jpr8-2v3g-wgf9 (moderate CWE-863) advisory disclosure — AG-UI UIAdapter.sanitize_messages dangling-tool-call strip insufficient in v2 >=2.0.0 <2.5.0 and v1 >=1.88.0 <1.107.1; patched retroactively in 2.5.0 (07-04) and freshly in 1.107.1 today (07-11). Not vulnerable if tools use requires_approval=True/ApprovalRequiredToolset OR validate arguments with authorization enforcement. Load-bearing new primitives in v2.9.0: (a) /usage slash command for clai CLI (cumulative token consumption by model invocation); (b) GPT-5.6 model support with reasoning-mode functionality for OpenAI integrations; (c) RunContext.usage_limits exposed to tools (real-time consumption awareness during tool execution); (d) Anthropic Files API beta auto-activation for UploadedFile messages; (e) MCPToolset id-validation safeguards; (f) FIPS-compliant hash marking; (g) repr() crash prevention for message parts with non-boolean field comparisons; (h) nested capture_run_messages behavior restoration; (i) cancellation deadlock elimination; (j) end_strategy='early' enforcement across output types. v1.107.1: v1-maintenance-line security patch for same GHSA. Ten-releases-in-thirteen-days cadence (v2.1.0 06-29 → v2.9.0 07-11 + v1.107.1 v1-maintenance-security-patch). Kit-recommended pin advances pydantic-ai>=2.8.0 → pydantic-ai>=2.9.0 for consumers who want /usage + GPT-5.6 + usage_limits + Anthropic Files API beta auto-activation + MCPToolset id-validation. v1-line consumers: pydantic-ai>=1.107.1 for same GHSA fix on v1 maintenance line. Severity ⚠ (borderline ⚠/🚨 for moderate CWE-863 advisory → DOWN to ⚠ per doctrine because fix already shipped in v2.5.0 07-04 and kit's pydantic-ai>=2.5.0 recommendation from 07-04 already carries the fix; retroactive advisory publication of fix-already-shipped, not a live-in-the-wild vulnerability; feature-additive minor release with new primitives; no breaking-change). Optional integration paths deferred to Monthly Integration: KB-06 §hosted-agent-safety retroactive-advisory-publication-of-shipped-fix citation slot (fix-shipped-before-disclosure pattern) + MCPToolset id-validation-safeguards + RunContext.usage_limits tool-execution-limits primitives; KB-01 §adapter-boundary Anthropic Files API beta auto-activation for UploadedFile extends 07-08/07-09/07-10 adapter-boundary-hygiene arc; MCP-SERVER-REGISTRY.md §MCP-toolset-config-fidelity MCPToolset id-validation-safeguards folds with 07-10 v2.1.206 MCP request_timeout_ms + OAuth-token-refresh into widening MCP-config-fidelity-hardening arc; AGENTS.md §Hosted-Agent-Observability RunContext.usage_limits tool-execution-limits primitive. Aggregation candidate for Weekly Synthesis 2026-28.
